parameters.content: ## S0 — CONTROL  |  Triggers  +  Date Setup  +  Environment Config

**ENV VARS** (n8n Settings → Variables)
FINNHUB_KEY | TWELVEDATA_KEY | ALPHA_VANTAGE_KEY
NEWS_API_KEY | FRED_API_KEY | CONGRESS_API_KEY | FEC_API_KEY
METALS_DEV_KEY | OPENAI_API_KEY | XAI_API_KEY
GOOGLE_AI_KEY | DEEPSEEK_API_KEY | GITHUB_TOKEN | CIL_WEBHOOK_URL

**After import:** click Telegram nodes → select 'Telegram account'

nodes.name: Schedule 6AM ET
nodes.notes: Trigger: Daily HUNTER scan at 6AM ET on market days.

nodes.name: Schedule 12:30PM ET
nodes.notes: Trigger: Midday HUNTER refresh at 12:30PM ET.

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Trigger: Manual fire for dev/debug runs. Use for test cycles.

nodes.name: Date Setup
nodes.notes: S0: Builds date variables (today, thirtyDaysAgo, etc.) used downstream by all H-modules.

parameters.content: ## S1 — MARKET DATA  |  H1 Volume · H2 Breakout · H3 Options Flow · H4 Sector · H5 Insider · H6 13F · H7 Earnings

nodes.name: H1 — Volume Anomaly
nodes.notes: H1: Fetches real-time volume anomaly signals via Alpha Vantage. Flags tickers with 2x+ avg volume.

nodes.name: H2a — AV Top Movers
nodes.notes: H2a: Alpha Vantage top gainers/losers. Seeds opportunity list for URIEL/COLOSSUS.

nodes.name: H2b — News Velocity
nodes.notes: H2b: NewsAPI headline velocity scan. Measures news flow rate as sentiment proxy.

nodes.name: H3 — Options Flow
nodes.notes: H3: Options flow data. Unusual activity = institutional positioning signal.

nodes.name: H4 — Sector Rotation
nodes.notes: H4: Alpha Vantage sector performance. Identifies capital rotation between sectors.

nodes.name: H5 — Insider Transactions
nodes.notes: H5: Finnhub insider transaction feed. Mandatory per HUNTER DRIFT FIX protocol.

nodes.name: H6 — SEC 13F EDGAR
nodes.notes: H6: EDGAR 13F filings. Tracks institutional position disclosures.

nodes.name: H7 — Earnings Calendar
nodes.notes: H7: Finnhub earnings calendar. Feeds pre-earnings drift detection in SYNTHESIS.

parameters.content: ## S2 — TECHNICAL  |  H8-H20  Short Interest · ETF/Indices · RSI · MACD · BB · ADX · ATR · EMA · Stoch · Form 4

nodes.name: H8 — FINRA Short Sale
nodes.notes: H8: FINRA short sale volume. Elevated short = potential squeeze or confirmation signal.

nodes.name: H9 — IPO Calendar
nodes.notes: H9: Finnhub IPO calendar. Feeds Ring 4 event-driven plays.

nodes.name: H10 — TD Indices
nodes.notes: H10: Twelve Data major index prices. Broad market context for gate decisions.

nodes.name: H11 — TD RSI
nodes.notes: H11: Twelve Data RSI values across watchlist. Overbought/oversold filter.

nodes.name: H12 — TD MACD
nodes.notes: H12: Twelve Data MACD signals. Trend confirmation for COLOSSUS setups.

nodes.name: H13 — TD Bollinger
nodes.notes: H13: Twelve Data Bollinger Bands. Volatility and breakout detection.

nodes.name: H14 — TD ADX
nodes.notes: H14: Twelve Data ADX. Trend strength measurement — filters weak setups.

nodes.name: H15 — TD ATR
nodes.notes: H15: Twelve Data ATR. Feeds stop-loss sizing per IRONCLAD v2.1.

nodes.name: H16 — TD EMA
nodes.notes: H16: Twelve Data EMA stack. Trend direction confirmation.

nodes.name: H17 — SEC Form 4
nodes.notes: H17: SEC Form 4 insider trades. Mandatory per HUNTER DRIFT FIX — H4/H17/H22 required on every scan.

nodes.name: H18 — TD Stochastic
nodes.notes: H18: Twelve Data Stochastic oscillator. Momentum entry/exit timing.

nodes.name: H19 — Finnhub Recs
nodes.notes: H19: Finnhub analyst recommendations. Consensus shift detection.

nodes.name: H20 — TD Volume
nodes.notes: H20: Twelve Data volume series. Cross-validates H1 anomaly flags.

parameters.content: ## S3 — INTELLIGENCE  |  H21 Congress Bills · H22 Whale 13F · H23 M&A 8-K · H24 Social Trending

nodes.name: H21 — Congress Bills
nodes.notes: H21: Congress.gov bill activity. Legislative catalyst detection.

nodes.name: H22 — SEC Whale 13F
nodes.notes: H22: SEC institutional whale 13F filings. Mandatory per HUNTER DRIFT FIX — tracks Sprott/Buffett/Druckenmiller/Burry/Ackman/Dalio.

nodes.name: H23 — SEC 8-K
nodes.notes: H23: SEC 8-K material event filings. Corporate action early warning.

nodes.name: H24 — Yahoo Trending
nodes.notes: H24: Yahoo Finance trending tickers. Retail sentiment proxy.

parameters.content: ## S4 — MACRO  |  H25 Earnings · H26 Economic Calendar · H27 FRED · H28 Geopolitical News · H29 Metals Spot

nodes.name: H25 — Earnings Cal
nodes.notes: H25: Secondary earnings calendar. Cross-validates H7 for completeness.

nodes.name: H26 — Economic Cal
nodes.notes: H26: Economic calendar events. FOMC, CPI, NFP — macro gate inputs.

nodes.name: H27 — FRED Macro
nodes.notes: H27: FRED macro indicators. Feeds Gate 9 correlation checks.

nodes.name: H28 — Geopolitical
nodes.notes: H28: NewsAPI geopolitical headline scan. Feeds Gate 8.5 Regulatory Shock.

nodes.name: H29 — Metals Spot
nodes.notes: H29: Metals spot prices. Silver thesis inputs — Shanghai premium tracking.

parameters.content: ## S5 — INFLUENCE CHAIN  |  H30 Congress Trades · H31 Bills · H32 Lobbying · H33 Contracts · H34 FEC · H36 LDA  →  H35 Correlator

nodes.name: H30 — Congress Trades
nodes.notes: H30: UW congressional trades via $vars.UNUSUAL_WHALES_API_KEY. No credential required. STOCK Act compliance — flags watched politicians.

nodes.name: H31a — Congress Bills
nodes.notes: H31a: Congress.gov bill detail fetch. Expanded legislative intelligence.

nodes.name: H31b — Congress Amend
nodes.notes: H31b: Congressional amendment tracking. Policy shift early detection.

nodes.name: H32 — LDA Lobbying
nodes.notes: H32: Senate LDA lobbying registrations. Corporate influence signal.

nodes.name: H33 — USASpending

parameters.jsonBody: ={"filters":{"time_period":[{"start_date":"{{$json.thirtyDaysAgo}}","end_date":"{{$json.today}}"}],"award_type_codes":["A","B","C","D"]},"fields":["Award ID","Recipient Name","Award Amount","Awarding Agency","Description","Action Date","NAICS Code"],"page":1,"limit":15,"sort":"Award Amount","order":"desc"}

nodes.notes: H33: USASpending.gov federal contract data. Government capital deployment tracker.

nodes.name: H34 — FEC
nodes.notes: H34: FEC campaign finance data. Political money flow — feeds H35 correlator.

nodes.name: H36 — LDA Recent
nodes.notes: H36: Recent LDA lobbying filings. Near-real-time influence intelligence.

nodes.name: H31 Committee Merge
nodes.notes: Merge: Combines H31a and H31b Congressional bill data streams.

nodes.name: H30-Normalize
nodes.notes: Normalize: Maps UW congressional trade response to HUNTER standard signal schema.

nodes.name: H31-Normalize
nodes.notes: Normalize: Maps Congress.gov bill data to HUNTER signal schema.

nodes.name: H32-Normalize
nodes.notes: Normalize: Maps LDA lobbying data to HUNTER influence schema.

nodes.name: H33-Normalize
nodes.notes: Normalize: Maps USASpending contract data to HUNTER signal schema.

nodes.name: H34-Normalize
nodes.notes: Normalize: Maps FEC campaign finance data to HUNTER signal schema.

nodes.name: H36-Normalize
nodes.notes: Normalize: Maps recent LDA filings to HUNTER influence schema.

nodes.name: Influence Merge
nodes.notes: Merge: Combines all H30–H36 influence intelligence streams before H35.

nodes.name: H35 — Influence Correlator
nodes.notes: H35: Correlates lobbying, FEC, and congressional trade data. Identifies capital/policy convergence signals.

parameters.content: ## S6 — CORRELATION & KILL SWITCH  |  H37 DXY · H38 10Y Yield · H39 ETF Flow · H40 GEX · H41 Lease Rates · H42 COMEX  →  Gate 9

nodes.name: H37 — FRED DXY
nodes.notes: H37: FRED DXY (dollar index via DX=F proxy). Gate 9 Correlation input.

nodes.name: H38 — FRED 10Y
nodes.notes: H38: FRED 10Y Treasury yield (ZB=F proxy). Gate 9 Correlation input.

nodes.name: H39a — SLV
nodes.notes: H39a: SLV ETF price. Silver flow proxy — Ring 2 metals thesis input.

nodes.name: H39b — GLD
nodes.notes: H39b: GLD ETF price. Gold flow proxy — metals complex health check.

nodes.name: H39c — SIL
nodes.notes: H39c: SIL ETF price. Silver miners flow — confirms physical vs paper divergence.

nodes.name: H40 — GEX Options
nodes.notes: H40: GEX (Gamma Exposure) options data. 4PM gamma reset cycle — options learning path input.

nodes.name: H41 — FRED Gold Series
nodes.notes: H41: FRED gold price series. Historical correlation for metals thesis.

nodes.name: H42 — COMEX Inventory
nodes.notes: H42: COMEX inventory data. Physical delivery demand — critical for silver thesis validation.

nodes.name: H37-CALC DXY
nodes.notes: Calc: Extracts and formats DXY signal from FRED response for Gate 9.

nodes.name: H38-CALC Yield
nodes.notes: Calc: Extracts and formats 10Y yield signal from FRED response for Gate 9.

nodes.name: H39 ETF Merge
nodes.notes: Merge: Combines SLV/GLD/SIL ETF price streams for H39 flow calculation.

nodes.name: H39-CALC Flow
nodes.notes: Calc: Computes metals flow composite (H39) from ETF price deltas.

nodes.name: Correlation Signal Merge
nodes.notes: Merge: Combines H37/H38/H39 calc outputs for Gate 9 input.

nodes.name: Correlation Full Merge
nodes.notes: Merge: Final merge of Gate 9 correlation data with main HUNTER pipeline.

nodes.name: GATE 9 — Correlation Check
nodes.notes: Gate 9: METATRON v10.8 Correlation Check. Validates H37-DXY + H38-YIELD + H39-FLOW. Kill Switch trigger if adverse.

nodes.name: Kill Switch Decision
nodes.notes: Decision: Routes to KILL SWITCH ALERT if Gate 9 triggers adverse correlation. No override permitted.

nodes.name: KILL SWITCH ALERT

parameters.text: =🚨 KILL SWITCH — GATE 9 ACTIVATED Condition: {{ $json.condition }} DXY: {{ $json.h37_regime }} | Yield: {{ $json.h38_regime }} IRONCLAD AUTO-PROTOCOL: → 50% metals reduction required → 48hr embargo on metals entries → NO OVERRIDE METATRON v10.8 | HUNTER v3.3

nodes.notes: Alert: Sends KILL SWITCH Telegram notification. Auto 50% metals reduction + 48hr embargo per IRONCLAD v2.1.

nodes.name: Kill Switch Log
nodes.notes: Log: Records kill switch activation event. Audit trail for post-mortem.

parameters.content: ## S7 — CONSOLIDATION  |  All H modules + Correlation Gate output  →  Master Merge  →  Data Aggregator

nodes.name: HUNTER MASTER MERGE
nodes.notes: Merge: Aggregates all H-module outputs (H1-H42) into single pipeline for DATA AGGREGATOR.

nodes.name: DATA AGGREGATOR
nodes.notes: Core: Aggregates all module outputs, computes scan summary, counts errors, and packages payload for agents.

parameters.content: ## S8 — HUNTER AGENT PASS  |  URIEL · COLOSSUS · HANIEL · RAZIEL  →  Synthesis  (pure opportunity discovery — no portfolio context)

**Option C — Dual Layer**
HUNTER agents: opportunity discovery, no portfolio awareness
CIL (S9): trade confirmation with IRONCLAD + portfolio context
Same Collective, different mandates, different instructions.

nodes.name: URIEL — Strategic Opportunity
nodes.notes: URIEL — Strategic Opportunity: Code node — direct API call via this.helpers.httpRequest. Zero serialization issues.

messages.content: You are URIEL, CEO/Strategic Director of the Uriel Covenant AI Collective. Analyze HUNTER market scan data. Identify top opportunities. Ring 3=structural 6-12mo, Ring 4=tactical 1-4wk, Ring 5=lottery max 2%. ZERO portfolio awareness. OUTPUT JSON ONLY: {"agent":"URIEL","opportunities":[{"ticker":"","signal_tier":"PRIME|STRONG|PROBE","confidence":0,"thesis":"","key_signal":"","entry_zone":"","stop":"","target":"","ring":"3|4|5","time_horizon":""}],"macro_regime":"BULL|BEAR|NEUTRAL","market_breadth":"EXPANDING|CONTRACTING|MIXED","hot_sector":"","top_opportunity":""}

nodes.name: COLOSSUS — Technical Setups
nodes.notes: COLOSSUS — Technical Setups: Code node — direct API call via this.helpers.httpRequest. Zero serialization issues.

messages.content: You are COLOSSUS, CTO/Technical Analyst of the Uriel Covenant AI Collective. Identify strongest technical setups: VWAP reclaims, breakouts, momentum, volume confirmation. ZERO portfolio awareness. OUTPUT JSON ONLY: {"agent":"COLOSSUS","setups":[{"ticker":"","setup_type":"BREAKOUT|VWAP_RECLAIM|MOMENTUM|REVERSAL","confidence":0,"entry":"","stop":"","target":"","r_r":0,"volume_signal":"HIGH|NORMAL|LOW","momentum":"STRONG|MODERATE|WEAK"}],"market_structure":"TRENDING|RANGING|BREAKING","best_setup":""}

nodes.name: HANIEL Payload Format
nodes.notes: Format: Structures HUNTER data payload for HANIEL (Google AI) API requirements.

nodes.name: HANIEL — Intelligence Signals
nodes.notes: HANIEL: Code node — Gemini 2.0 Flash via httpRequestWithAuthentication.

nodes.name: RAZIEL — Counter Thesis
nodes.notes: RAZIEL — Counter Thesis: Code node — direct API call via this.helpers.httpRequest. Zero serialization issues.

messages.content: You are RAZIEL, CAO/Counter-Thesis Analyst. Challenge every opportunity. Find failure modes. Apply IRONCLAD: stop -5%, trim +10% sell 50%, trim +20% sell 60%, no same-day re-entry. OUTPUT JSON ONLY: {"agent":"RAZIEL","counter_analyses":[{"ticker":"","raziel_score":0,"primary_risk":"","verdict":"CLEAR|CAUTION|ABORT","ironclad_flag":"Y|N"}],"do_not_touch":[],"cleanest_thesis":""}

nodes.name: HUNTER AGENT MERGE
nodes.notes: Merge: Combines all 4 agent responses (URIEL/COLOSSUS/HANIEL/RAZIEL) for MICHA synthesis.

nodes.name: HUNTER SYNTHESIS — MICHA
nodes.notes: Synthesis: MICHA final synthesis. Cross-validates agent consensus, applies METATRON gates, produces top-10 ranked opportunities.

parameters.content: ## S9 — DELIVERY  |  Telegram Morning Brief  ·  CIL v6.1 Webhook (Top 3 PRIME → Trade Confirmation)  ·  GitHub Archive

nodes.name: Format Telegram Brief
nodes.notes: Format: Structures synthesis output into Telegram-compatible market brief.

nodes.name: Send Telegram Brief
nodes.notes: Deliver: Sends formatted HUNTER market brief to Telegram channel.

nodes.name: Fire CIL Webhook
nodes.notes: Integration: Packages HUNTER results as CIL v6.1 webhook payload for collective consensus run.

nodes.name: CIL v6.1 Webhook
nodes.notes: Deliver: Fires payload to CIL v6.1 n8n webhook endpoint for multi-agent processing.

nodes.name: GitHub Archive Prep
nodes.notes: Archive: Prepares HUNTER scan results for GitHub archive commit.

nodes.name: GitHub Archive Write
nodes.notes: Archive: Writes scan results to Barefootservants2/A2E_Protocols GitHub repo.

meta.description: HUNTER v3.1 — H1-H42, 10 sections S0-S9, dual-layer AI (Option C), all 12 v3.0 gaps fixed. METATRON v10.8 | March 30 2026
